title: figma-cache raw.json optional extensions
description: Loose schema for machine-derived fields merged during MCP hydrate. Core raw.json fields are not fully specified here.

iconMetrics.description: Icon box + inset metrics extracted from get_design_context (heuristic).

layoutMetrics.description: Layout numbers merged from mcp-raw/figma-geometry-metrics.json (e.g. spacer_between_nodes_y).

relatedCacheKeys.description: Peer cacheKeys linked via index.json flows (edge.type starts with "related", e.g. related_auto). Hydrate refresh overwrites from current index.

evidenceSummary.description: Non-gating observability counts after hydrate (design context size, refs, geometry sidecar presence).
